cold.answer:
Your last cholesterol reading from April 5, 2026 shows:

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL (high)
LDL: 162 mg/dL (high — the "bad" cholesterol)
HDL: 38 mg/dL (low — the "good" cholesterol)
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL (high)

These numbers suggest your cholesterol levels need attention. You're already on blood pressure medication (Telmisartan and Amlodipine) and Aspirin, which helps protect your heart. Your doctor referred you to a cardiologist in April — it's worth following up on that to discuss whether you need additional medication or lifestyle changes for your cholesterol and heart health.
